_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: For MPNST, the model correctly diagnosed 50/63 cases (79.37%)...For PNF, the model correctly diagnosed 28/60 cases (46.67%)...A FN rate of 14.29/15.25% (with/without missed lesions)
details: Independent test set: correctly diagnosed 50/63 MPNST cases (79.37%) and 28/60 PNF cases (46.67%), false negative rate of 14.29-15.25%
